headline: New 50-State Report on the Riskiest Trades to Insure for General Liability
summary: USA Business Insurance Services, inc. announced the release of its new national report, Riskiest Trades to Insure in the U.S. for General Liability, a state-by-state analysis of the trades, sectors, and claim patterns that create the most pressure in today's general liability insurance market.
